title: Samsung's India R&D centres played pivotal role in Galaxy S26 development
description: Samsung's India R&D centers in Bengaluru and Noida were key to developing the new Galaxy S26 series. These centers are vital for integrating Artificial Intelligence into Samsung devices. India's young population is highly receptive to AI technology. Samsung sees India as a strategic market, contributing significantly to its global revenue and product innovation.

title: Pentagon feud with Anthropic shines light on AI’s role in mass surveillance
description: Anthropic PBC's clash with the Pentagon is drawing fresh attention to a lightly regulated practice: the US government's purchase of commercially available information, such as browsing histories and location data, and the growing use of artificial intelligence to analyse it at scale.

title: Pentagon says it is labeling AI company Anthropic a supply chain risk ’effective immediately’
description: The Trump administration is following through with its threat to designate artificial intelligence company Anthropic as a supply chain risk in an unprecedented move that could force other government contractors to stop using the AI chatbot Claude.

title: TCS shares in focus after CEO says IT major in advanced talks for more AI data centres in India
description: TCS share price: TCS CEO K Krithivasan said the company is in advanced discussions with multiple hyperscalers to build more AI data centres in India, citing strong demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure. title: Africa emerges as new arena in US-China competition over artificial intelligence

content:
